| >Description:
| 	The abovementioned locale is simply missing. Thanks for some kind soul
| 	we already have localized keymap and necessary console fonts. I hope
| 	this addition fills the gap and will be found also in the upcoming
| 	4.3-RELEASE.
| >How-To-Repeat:
| 	env LANG=et_EE.ISO_8859-15 date
| >Fix:
| 
| 	Following needs makefile glue etc. I'll leave it to more knowledgeable

Can you put it up for download via HTTP? I'll look into this.
